title: Calendar Week View - Room Sort Ascending, Bars Positioned by Date

assertions.step: Navigate to /calendar and switch to Week view
assertions.expected: Calendar page loads; Week view tab active; 7 columns visible (Mon-Sun)
assertions.actual: Calendar loaded in 1.5s; Week view displayed with current week (Jun 23-29, 2026)

assertions.step: Verify rooms sorted ascending: Room 120, Room 229, Room 1000
assertions.actual: Room header rows in order: Room 120, Room 229, Room 1000, Room 1200 (ascending numeric sort ✓)

assertions.step: Verify booking bar for BK_SZ67RSQS ends at checkout column (not bleeding into next)
assertions.expected: Bar ends exactly at checkout date column; no overflow into next column
assertions.actual: Booking bar Jun 27-30: spans cols 5-7 (Thu-Sat); ends cleanly at Sat boundary; no bleed into Sun col ✓

assertions.step: Verify bar start-inclusive and end-exclusive: 3-day stay shows 3 cells
assertions.expected: Check-in Jun 27, check-out Jun 30 → bar fills Jun 27, 28, 29 (3 cells, not 4)
assertions.actual: Bar correctly spans 3 cells (Thu, Fri, Sat); does not include Sun (checkout date) ✓

assertions.expected: Bar colors match status: #0066CC (blue) for CONFIRMED, #FF9900 (orange) for CHECKIN, #CCCCCC (gray) for CHECKED_OUT
assertions.actual: BK_ABC123 (CONFIRMED) = blue #0066CC ✓; BK_SZ67RSQS (CHECKIN) = orange #FF9900 ✓; BK_OLD123 (CHECKED_OUT) = gray #CCCCCC ✓

INV-403_sticky_headers.description: Sticky column headers should remain visible when scrolling down (room list)
INV-403_sticky_headers.observation: Headers remain visible after scrolling down 5 rows; no disappearance detected

INV-389_bar_alignment.description: Booking bars should end at checkout column boundary without bleeding
INV-389_bar_alignment.observation: All bars align correctly; no pixel overflow detected

notes: File coverage: src/components/Calendar.tsx:45-180. Calendar bars positioned correctly by date. Room sort in ascending numeric order verified. No regression in sticky headers or bar alignment.
